subcodes.first_line: O spiritual leaf! Open thine eyes and turn thy gaze unto the Abhá Kingdom, that thou mayest behold from the hidden realm "Glory be to my Lord!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه روحانیه چشم بگشا و بملکوت ابهی توجه کن تا از جهان پنهان سبحان ربی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Greatest Name, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
